translations.en: O! Hisham indeed/already made Allah that dlyla upon m'rfth ban for them mdbra so he said and skhr lkm the night and alnhar and the sun and alqmr and alnjwm mskhrat bamrh indeed in that layat for a people they reason and said he/it who/which khlqkm from trab then from ntfh then from 'lqh then brings you out tfla then ltblghwa strongest of you then ltkwnwa shywkha and mnkm who/whoever he dies/is taken from qbl and ltblghwa an appointed term msma and perhaps you t'qlwn and said indeed in alternation the night and the daytime and what/not sent down Allah from the sky from rzq fahya by it the earth after mwtha and tsryf the winds and the clouds almskhr between the sky and the earth layat for a people they reason and said gives life the earth after mwtha indeed/already byna lkm alayat perhaps you t'qlwn and said and jnat from a'nab and zr' and nkhyl snwan and ghyr snwan is watered bma' one and nfdl b'dha 'la b'd in alakl indeed in that layat for a people they reason and said and from His signs He shows you albrq khwfa and tm'a and He sends down from the sky ma' fyhyy by it the earth after mwtha indeed in that layat for a people they reason and said ql t'alwa I recite what hrm rbkm upon you that not associate partners by it anything and balwaldyn kindness and not you kill your children from poverty we nrzqkm and them (emphasis) and not approach alfwahsh what zhr mnha and what btn and not you kill the soul which (f) hrm Allah except balhq that (pl) He commanded you by it perhaps you t'qlwn and said hl for you from what mlkt your oaths from shrka' in what rzqnakm fantm in it swa' tkhafwnhm kkhyftkm yourselves kdhlk nfsl alayat for a people they reason
translations.ur: اے Hisham indeed/already made Allah that dlyla پر m'rfth ban for them mdbra so he said اور skhr lkm the night اور alnhar اور the sun اور alqmr اور alnjwm mskhrat bamrh بے شک میں that layat for a people they reason اور said he/it who/which khlqkm سے trab then سے ntfh then سے 'lqh then brings you out tfla then ltblghwa strongest of you then ltkwnwa shywkha اور mnkm who/whoever he dies/is taken سے qbl اور ltblghwa an appointed term msma اور perhaps you t'qlwn اور said بے شک میں alternation the night اور the daytime اور what/not sent down Allah سے the sky سے rzq fahya by it the earth after mwtha اور tsryf the winds اور the clouds almskhr between the sky اور the earth layat for a people they reason اور said gives life the earth after mwtha indeed/already byna lkm alayat perhaps you t'qlwn اور said اور jnat سے a'nab اور zr' اور nkhyl snwan اور ghyr snwan is watered bma' one اور nfdl b'dha 'la b'd میں alakl بے شک میں that layat for a people they reason اور said اور سے His signs He shows you albrq khwfa اور tm'a اور He sends down سے the sky ma' fyhyy by it the earth after mwtha بے شک میں that layat for a people they reason اور said ql t'alwa I recite what hrm rbkm upon you that not associate partners by it anything اور balwaldyn kindness اور نہیں you kill your children سے poverty we nrzqkm اور them (emphasis) اور نہیں approach alfwahsh what zhr mnha اور what btn اور نہیں you kill the soul which (f) hrm Allah except balhq that (pl) He commanded you by it perhaps you t'qlwn اور said hl for you سے what mlkt your oaths سے shrka' میں what rzqnakm fantm in it swa' tkhafwnhm kkhyftkm yourselves kdhlk nfsl alayat for a people they reason
translations.tr: ey Hisham indeed/already made Allah that dlyla üzerine m'rfth ban for them mdbra so he said ve skhr lkm the night ve alnhar ve the sun ve alqmr ve alnjwm mskhrat bamrh muhakkak içinde that layat for a people they reason ve said he/it who/which khlqkm -den trab then -den ntfh then -den 'lqh then brings you out tfla then ltblghwa strongest of you then ltkwnwa shywkha ve mnkm who/whoever he dies/is taken -den qbl ve ltblghwa an appointed term msma ve perhaps you t'qlwn ve said muhakkak içinde alternation the night ve the daytime ve what/not sent down Allah -den the sky -den rzq fahya by it the earth after mwtha ve tsryf the winds ve the clouds almskhr between the sky ve the earth layat for a people they reason ve said gives life the earth after mwtha indeed/already byna lkm alayat perhaps you t'qlwn ve said ve jnat -den a'nab ve zr' ve nkhyl snwan ve ghyr snwan is watered bma' one ve nfdl b'dha 'la b'd içinde alakl muhakkak içinde that layat for a people they reason ve said ve -den His signs He shows you albrq khwfa ve tm'a ve He sends down -den the sky ma' fyhyy by it the earth after mwtha muhakkak içinde that layat for a people they reason ve said ql t'alwa I recite what hrm rbkm upon you that not associate partners by it anything ve balwaldyn kindness ve değil you kill your children -den poverty we nrzqkm ve them (emphasis) ve değil approach alfwahsh what zhr mnha ve what btn ve değil you kill the soul which (f) hrm Allah except balhq that (pl) He commanded you by it perhaps you t'qlwn ve said hl for you -den what mlkt your oaths -den shrka' içinde what rzqnakm fantm in it swa' tkhafwnhm kkhyftkm yourselves kdhlk nfsl alayat for a people they reason
translations.fa: ای Hisham indeed/already made Allah that dlyla بر m'rfth ban for them mdbra so he said و skhr lkm the night و alnhar و the sun و alqmr و alnjwm mskhrat bamrh به درستی در that layat for a people they reason و said he/it who/which khlqkm از trab then از ntfh then از 'lqh then brings you out tfla then ltblghwa strongest of you then ltkwnwa shywkha و mnkm who/whoever he dies/is taken از qbl و ltblghwa an appointed term msma و perhaps you t'qlwn و said به درستی در alternation the night و the daytime و what/not sent down Allah از the sky از rzq fahya by it the earth after mwtha و tsryf the winds و the clouds almskhr between the sky و the earth layat for a people they reason و said gives life the earth after mwtha indeed/already byna lkm alayat perhaps you t'qlwn و said و jnat از a'nab و zr' و nkhyl snwan و ghyr snwan is watered bma' one و nfdl b'dha 'la b'd در alakl به درستی در that layat for a people they reason و said و از His signs He shows you albrq khwfa و tm'a و He sends down از the sky ma' fyhyy by it the earth after mwtha به درستی در that layat for a people they reason و said ql t'alwa I recite what hrm rbkm upon you that not associate partners by it anything و balwaldyn kindness و نه you kill your children از poverty we nrzqkm و them (emphasis) و نه approach alfwahsh what zhr mnha و what btn و نه you kill the soul which (f) hrm Allah except balhq that (pl) He commanded you by it perhaps you t'qlwn و said hl for you از what mlkt your oaths از shrka' در what rzqnakm fantm in it swa' tkhafwnhm kkhyftkm yourselves kdhlk nfsl alayat for a people they reason
translations.id: wahai Hisham indeed/already made Allah that dlyla atas m'rfth ban for them mdbra so he said dan skhr lkm the night dan alnhar dan the sun dan alqmr dan alnjwm mskhrat bamrh sesungguhnya di dalam that layat for a people they reason dan said he/it who/which khlqkm dari trab then dari ntfh then dari 'lqh then brings you out tfla then ltblghwa strongest of you then ltkwnwa shywkha dan mnkm who/whoever he dies/is taken dari qbl dan ltblghwa an appointed term msma dan perhaps you t'qlwn dan said sesungguhnya di dalam alternation the night dan the daytime dan what/not sent down Allah dari the sky dari rzq fahya by it the earth after mwtha dan tsryf the winds dan the clouds almskhr between the sky dan the earth layat for a people they reason dan said gives life the earth after mwtha indeed/already byna lkm alayat perhaps you t'qlwn dan said dan jnat dari a'nab dan zr' dan nkhyl snwan dan ghyr snwan is watered bma' one dan nfdl b'dha 'la b'd di dalam alakl sesungguhnya di dalam that layat for a people they reason dan said dan dari His signs He shows you albrq khwfa dan tm'a dan He sends down dari the sky ma' fyhyy by it the earth after mwtha sesungguhnya di dalam that layat for a people they reason dan said ql t'alwa I recite what hrm rbkm upon you that not associate partners by it anything dan balwaldyn kindness dan tidak you kill your children dari poverty we nrzqkm dan them (emphasis) dan tidak approach alfwahsh what zhr mnha dan what btn dan tidak you kill the soul which (f) hrm Allah except balhq that (pl) He commanded you by it perhaps you t'qlwn dan said hl for you dari what mlkt your oaths dari shrka' di dalam what rzqnakm fantm in it swa' tkhafwnhm kkhyftkm yourselves kdhlk nfsl alayat for a people they reason
translations.bn: হে Hisham indeed/already made Allah that dlyla উপর m'rfth ban for them mdbra so he said এবং skhr lkm the night এবং alnhar এবং the sun এবং alqmr এবং alnjwm mskhrat bamrh নিশ্চয়ই মধ্যে that layat for a people they reason এবং said he/it who/which khlqkm থেকে trab then থেকে ntfh then থেকে 'lqh then brings you out tfla then ltblghwa strongest of you then ltkwnwa shywkha এবং mnkm who/whoever he dies/is taken থেকে qbl এবং ltblghwa an appointed term msma এবং perhaps you t'qlwn এবং said নিশ্চয়ই মধ্যে alternation the night এবং the daytime এবং what/not sent down Allah থেকে the sky থেকে rzq fahya by it the earth after mwtha এবং tsryf the winds এবং the clouds almskhr between the sky এবং the earth layat for a people they reason এবং said gives life the earth after mwtha indeed/already byna lkm alayat perhaps you t'qlwn এবং said এবং jnat থেকে a'nab এবং zr' এবং nkhyl snwan এবং ghyr snwan is watered bma' one এবং nfdl b'dha 'la b'd মধ্যে alakl নিশ্চয়ই মধ্যে that layat for a people they reason এবং said এবং থেকে His signs He shows you albrq khwfa এবং tm'a এবং He sends down থেকে the sky ma' fyhyy by it the earth after mwtha নিশ্চয়ই মধ্যে that layat for a people they reason এবং said ql t'alwa I recite what hrm rbkm upon you that not associate partners by it anything এবং balwaldyn kindness এবং না you kill your children থেকে poverty we nrzqkm এবং them (emphasis) এবং না approach alfwahsh what zhr mnha এবং what btn এবং না you kill the soul which (f) hrm Allah except balhq that (pl) He commanded you by it perhaps you t'qlwn এবং said hl for you থেকে what mlkt your oaths থেকে shrka' মধ্যে what rzqnakm fantm in it swa' tkhafwnhm kkhyftkm yourselves kdhlk nfsl alayat for a people they reason
translations.es: oh Hisham indeed/already made Allah that dlyla sobre m'rfth ban for them mdbra so he said y skhr lkm the night y alnhar y the sun y alqmr y alnjwm mskhrat bamrh ciertamente en that layat for a people they reason y said he/it who/which khlqkm de trab then de ntfh then de 'lqh then brings you out tfla then ltblghwa strongest of you then ltkwnwa shywkha y mnkm who/whoever he dies/is taken de qbl y ltblghwa an appointed term msma y perhaps you t'qlwn y said ciertamente en alternation the night y the daytime y what/not sent down Allah de the sky de rzq fahya by it the earth after mwtha y tsryf the winds y the clouds almskhr between the sky y the earth layat for a people they reason y said gives life the earth after mwtha indeed/already byna lkm alayat perhaps you t'qlwn y said y jnat de a'nab y zr' y nkhyl snwan y ghyr snwan is watered bma' one y nfdl b'dha 'la b'd en alakl ciertamente en that layat for a people they reason y said y de His signs He shows you albrq khwfa y tm'a y He sends down de the sky ma' fyhyy by it the earth after mwtha ciertamente en that layat for a people they reason y said ql t'alwa I recite what hrm rbkm upon you that not associate partners by it anything y balwaldyn kindness y no you kill your children de poverty we nrzqkm y them (emphasis) y no approach alfwahsh what zhr mnha y what btn y no you kill the soul which (f) hrm Allah except balhq that (pl) He commanded you by it perhaps you t'qlwn y said hl for you de what mlkt your oaths de shrka' en what rzqnakm fantm in it swa' tkhafwnhm kkhyftkm yourselves kdhlk nfsl alayat for a people they reason
translations.fr: ô Hisham indeed/already made Allah that dlyla sur m'rfth ban for them mdbra so he said et skhr lkm the night et alnhar et the sun et alqmr et alnjwm mskhrat bamrh certes dans that layat for a people they reason et said he/it who/which khlqkm de trab then de ntfh then de 'lqh then brings you out tfla then ltblghwa strongest of you then ltkwnwa shywkha et mnkm who/whoever he dies/is taken de qbl et ltblghwa an appointed term msma et perhaps you t'qlwn et said certes dans alternation the night et the daytime et what/not sent down Allah de the sky de rzq fahya by it the earth after mwtha et tsryf the winds et the clouds almskhr between the sky et the earth layat for a people they reason et said gives life the earth after mwtha indeed/already byna lkm alayat perhaps you t'qlwn et said et jnat de a'nab et zr' et nkhyl snwan et ghyr snwan is watered bma' one et nfdl b'dha 'la b'd dans alakl certes dans that layat for a people they reason et said et de His signs He shows you albrq khwfa et tm'a et He sends down de the sky ma' fyhyy by it the earth after mwtha certes dans that layat for a people they reason et said ql t'alwa I recite what hrm rbkm upon you that not associate partners by it anything et balwaldyn kindness et non you kill your children de poverty we nrzqkm et them (emphasis) et non approach alfwahsh what zhr mnha et what btn et non you kill the soul which (f) hrm Allah except balhq that (pl) He commanded you by it perhaps you t'qlwn et said hl for you de what mlkt your oaths de shrka' dans what rzqnakm fantm in it swa' tkhafwnhm kkhyftkm yourselves kdhlk nfsl alayat for a people they reason
translations.de: o Hisham indeed/already made Allah that dlyla auf m'rfth ban for them mdbra so he said und skhr lkm the night und alnhar und the sun und alqmr und alnjwm mskhrat bamrh wahrlich in that layat for a people they reason und said he/it who/which khlqkm von trab then von ntfh then von 'lqh then brings you out tfla then ltblghwa strongest of you then ltkwnwa shywkha und mnkm who/whoever he dies/is taken von qbl und ltblghwa an appointed term msma und perhaps you t'qlwn und said wahrlich in alternation the night und the daytime und what/not sent down Allah von the sky von rzq fahya by it the earth after mwtha und tsryf the winds und the clouds almskhr between the sky und the earth layat for a people they reason und said gives life the earth after mwtha indeed/already byna lkm alayat perhaps you t'qlwn und said und jnat von a'nab und zr' und nkhyl snwan und ghyr snwan is watered bma' one und nfdl b'dha 'la b'd in alakl wahrlich in that layat for a people they reason und said und von His signs He shows you albrq khwfa und tm'a und He sends down von the sky ma' fyhyy by it the earth after mwtha wahrlich in that layat for a people they reason und said ql t'alwa I recite what hrm rbkm upon you that not associate partners by it anything und balwaldyn kindness und nicht you kill your children von poverty we nrzqkm und them (emphasis) und nicht approach alfwahsh what zhr mnha und what btn und nicht you kill the soul which (f) hrm Allah except balhq that (pl) He commanded you by it perhaps you t'qlwn und said hl for you von what mlkt your oaths von shrka' in what rzqnakm fantm in it swa' tkhafwnhm kkhyftkm yourselves kdhlk nfsl alayat for a people they reason
translations.ru: о Hisham indeed/already made Allah that dlyla на m'rfth ban for them mdbra so he said и skhr lkm the night и alnhar и the sun и alqmr и alnjwm mskhrat bamrh поистине в that layat for a people they reason и said he/it who/which khlqkm из trab then из ntfh then из 'lqh then brings you out tfla then ltblghwa strongest of you then ltkwnwa shywkha и mnkm who/whoever he dies/is taken из qbl и ltblghwa an appointed term msma и perhaps you t'qlwn и said поистине в alternation the night и the daytime и what/not sent down Allah из the sky из rzq fahya by it the earth after mwtha и tsryf the winds и the clouds almskhr between the sky и the earth layat for a people they reason и said gives life the earth after mwtha indeed/already byna lkm alayat perhaps you t'qlwn и said и jnat из a'nab и zr' и nkhyl snwan и ghyr snwan is watered bma' one и nfdl b'dha 'la b'd в alakl поистине в that layat for a people they reason и said и из His signs He shows you albrq khwfa и tm'a и He sends down из the sky ma' fyhyy by it the earth after mwtha поистине в that layat for a people they reason и said ql t'alwa I recite what hrm rbkm upon you that not associate partners by it anything и balwaldyn kindness и не you kill your children из poverty we nrzqkm и them (emphasis) и не approach alfwahsh what zhr mnha и what btn и не you kill the soul which (f) hrm Allah except balhq that (pl) He commanded you by it perhaps you t'qlwn и said hl for you из what mlkt your oaths из shrka' в what rzqnakm fantm in it swa' tkhafwnhm kkhyftkm yourselves kdhlk nfsl alayat for a people they reason
translations.zh: 啊 Hisham indeed/already made Allah that dlyla 在...上 m'rfth ban for them mdbra so he said 和 skhr lkm the night 和 alnhar 和 the sun 和 alqmr 和 alnjwm mskhrat bamrh 确实 在 that layat for a people they reason 和 said he/it who/which khlqkm 从 trab then 从 ntfh then 从 'lqh then brings you out tfla then ltblghwa strongest of you then ltkwnwa shywkha 和 mnkm who/whoever he dies/is taken 从 qbl 和 ltblghwa an appointed term msma 和 perhaps you t'qlwn 和 said 确实 在 alternation the night 和 the daytime 和 what/not sent down Allah 从 the sky 从 rzq fahya by it the earth after mwtha 和 tsryf the winds 和 the clouds almskhr between the sky 和 the earth layat for a people they reason 和 said gives life the earth after mwtha indeed/already byna lkm alayat perhaps you t'qlwn 和 said 和 jnat 从 a'nab 和 zr' 和 nkhyl snwan 和 ghyr snwan is watered bma' one 和 nfdl b'dha 'la b'd 在 alakl 确实 在 that layat for a people they reason 和 said 和 从 His signs He shows you albrq khwfa 和 tm'a 和 He sends down 从 the sky ma' fyhyy by it the earth after mwtha 确实 在 that layat for a people they reason 和 said ql t'alwa I recite what hrm rbkm upon you that not associate partners by it anything 和 balwaldyn kindness 和 不 you kill your children 从 poverty we nrzqkm 和 them (emphasis) 和 不 approach alfwahsh what zhr mnha 和 what btn 和 不 you kill the soul which (f) hrm Allah except balhq that (pl) He commanded you by it perhaps you t'qlwn 和 said hl for you 从 what mlkt your oaths 从 shrka' 在 what rzqnakm fantm in it swa' tkhafwnhm kkhyftkm yourselves kdhlk nfsl alayat for a people they reason
